content.en:
Tear and pull!

Ye Tian once again cast the Sky Splitting Technique, tearing apart Mo En's abyss monster body again.

However, Mo En also has life-saving treasures on his body, so he will not be easily killed by Ye Tian.

I saw that Morn's body bloomed, and his broken body recovered again.

In an instant, Morn activated a fugitive void treasure on his body, instantly tearing the void and disappearing across the void at an unimaginable speed.

This escape void treasure is not simple, even the top true ancestor is difficult to hunt down Morn, it is the only top escape treasure on Morn's body, and even some Dao Ancestors who have just been promoted and have no tracking ability may not be able to successfully hunt down Morn.

If Ye Tian could only move the Void Void Divine Ability, and had no other means, he would not be able to catch up with Mo En.

Even if Ye Tian used the speed type origin divine power, he couldn't track it, and there was not even a trace.

If it weren't for that, that escaped void treasure wouldn't have been recognized as a top-notch life-saving thing, and if Morn wasn't afraid of falling, he wouldn't be afraid to use this life-saving thing that had not been used for countless years.

But he far underestimated Ye Tian, Ye Tian also had the Void Blade and Dun Yu, two Dao-level natal talents related to speed and space, and Ye Tian had recently practiced a Dao technique involving movement based on these two natal talents-Space Escape!

Space Escape is a Dao technique that Ye Tian currently has in addition to the Void Splitting Technique, and he has only practiced the Void Splitting Technique and Space Escape at present, not because he doesn't want to practice more Dao Techniques, but because Dao Techniques are difficult to cultivate, if he spends too much time cultivating multiple Dao Techniques, it will be a waste of time, resulting in various Dao Techniques not being proficient.

Therefore, it is the most reasonable situation to be proficient in the two Dao techniques at the moment.

In addition, he didn't have much Dao Inheritance, most of them were more rubbish Dao Techniques, which were just better than the top-grade Origin Divine Powers, so there was no need to waste time on cultivation.

Because of this, he only cultivated the Sky Splitting Technique and Space Escape.

The Sky Splitting Technique could be used to attack, and the Space Escape could be used to escape and hunt down, these two Dao Techniques were enough for Ye Tian to deal with most situations.

In front of Ye Tian, who had a space escape, even if Mo En used the top escape type void treasure, he would not be able to completely block Ye Tian's exploration.

Swish!

Ye Tian regarded the void as nothing, easily broke through the void, and his body instantly crossed the incomparably distant distance of the void, following Mo En's trail and chasing the past.

......

Somewhere in the core area of the Abyssal Shard.

Mo En's body came out of the space, and he immediately breathed a sigh of relief and said, "It should be to get rid of that half-step True Ancestor!"

But in an instant, his expression changed.

"This is the core area of the Infinite Abyss Fragment?"

Morn was shocked.

You must know that before the high-level leaders of the Royal Beast Sect were born, the core area was a forbidden area for them!

The rules here are very powerful, and I'm afraid it will be difficult to extend even the rules of the Quasi-Dao Realm, so the Abyss Lord here can exert a strong strength and don't need to sleep.

Before, a disciple of the Royal Beast Sect came here and was directly swallowed by an abyss lord.

"Get out of here, or it's dangerous!"

Morn thought to himself.

Suddenly.

The space rippled, and a figure emerged.

"What, you chased after you!"

Morn was shocked.

He used his only top-notch escape Void Treasure, the Void Leaf of the Void, and it was a purposeless shuttle, because the shuttle distance was too far, even he himself could not control it to shuttle to the core area of the Infinite Abyss Fragment.

But he never expected that even so, Ye Tian would be able to chase and kill, what kind of means did he rely on?

He couldn't think of it, after all, even if Ye Tian had a treasure similar to the Void Jiaye, he couldn't control the direction of the shuttle!

He didn't think much about it, but continued to run!

Hit!

Recover!

Hit!

Recover!

......

Morn relied entirely on life-saving things to hold on, and fled haphazardly.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to chase Mo En and come to an abyss cliff.

The Abyssal Cliff is a relatively common type of terrain for Infinite Abyss Fragments, but Morn is both a little afraid and a little hopeful when he sees this Abyssal Cliff.

Others may not know what this abyss cliff represents, but he knows it very well.

In the core area of the Infinite Abyss Shard, an Abyss Cliff often represents the territory of an Abyss Lord, and those Abyss Lords like to stay in such a place, and they are not weak Abyss Lords.

After all, there are not many abyssal cliffs, and the abyss lord who can really occupy an abyss cliff territory is definitely not the kind of weaker lord, but the relatively powerful abyss lord.

Just as Ye Tian and Mo En were approaching the abyss cliff, a terrifying aura passed out from under the abyss cliff.

"Abyss Lord!"

Ye Tian frowned, but he didn't retreat.

And Mo En gritted his teeth and rushed over directly, he wanted to use the Abyss Lord to deal with Ye Tian.

After all, his current identity is an abyss monster, and the abyss lord was also promoted from the abyss monster, even if he trespassed into the abyss lord's territory, it was a big crime, but at least it was better than Ye Tian, because Ye Tian was not an abyssal creature.

Non-abyssal creatures, once they enter the Infinite Abyss, are definitely true enemies, and will be hostile to the Abyss Lord.

It is very likely that the Abyss Lord will take action against Ye Tian and will not deal with him.

But it's a gamble, and if it's wrong, he's probably doomed, but it's better than running away all the time.

He really couldn't hold on, if he escaped for a while, he would really die!

--------

"I am the Lord of the Abyss, Enlodobas, and you have trespassed into my territory, capital offense!"

A roar was heard.

Then, an abyss lord like an ancient demon bull appeared in the void, and his aura did not know how many times surpass ordinary abyss monsters, even an abyss monster like Morn was far inferior to this abyss lord.

For example, some True Ancestors in the Chaos are also like ants in front of this Abyss Lord, and its strength is probably equivalent to that of some True Ancestors in the late stage of the Great Dao.

In terms of realm, Enrodomas was just an abyss lord at the beginning of the Great Dao.

As soon as this abyss lord appeared, it locked on Ye Tian and Mo En, but after it saw Ye Tian, most of its aura locked on Ye Tian, obviously hating Ye Tian even more.

At this moment, Ye Tian cast an illusion magic power on Mo En - Endless Destruction!

Endless Sinking is Xiao Yue's supernatural power, but this supernatural power was taught to Xiao Yue by Ye Tian, and Ye Tian is more proficient in this supernatural power, and has already cultivated to the extreme level.

Of course, there is no harm in the endless sinking of Morn, but it can block Morn for a moment.

And that moment is enough to change many things!

Wow!

Mo En's body froze, and he was trapped by the illusion for a moment, and then Ye Tian successively cast several Dao-level natal talents.

"Hell!"

"Amorphous Ice Boundary!"

"Life and Death Blood Realm!"

These three avenue-level natal talents all have the effect of trapping people, and I saw that the three-avenue-level natal talents turned into three major realms and locked Mo En.

Then, Ye Tian urged the Dao-level natal talent of sound killing with all his strength, and directly killed Mo En's soul.

Unfortunately, the threat was limited because of the fact that Sonic Kill was only a talent, not a Dao technique, but it still hit Morn hard again.

Then, the Sky Splitter attacked Morn again.

This time, under the multiple attacks, Morn finally couldn't bear it anymore, and his body turned into pieces.

Before he died, Morn had a thought-

"How could this person have so many Dao-level natal talents???

It's a pity that he has no chance to think.

Morn died, Ye Tian confronted the Abyss Lord Enrodobas, and he was not afraid that this Abyss Lord would recognize his Dao-level natal talent, because the Abyss Lord here was born later, and he didn't know anything about the outside world, so where did he know what Dao-level natal talent was.

That's why he dared to use a door-level natal talent so boldly.

However, this Abyss Lord would definitely not let him go easily.
